content.en:
Although Ye Tian did not have a token to enter this place, he had comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole Dao, and now that he sensed the space-time fluctuations of this place, he could directly escape into it.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian escaped into this piece of heaven and earth with the Extreme Space-Time Extreme Dao, and then hidden, even if it was other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers who comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Extreme Dao, if they didn't perceive the entire heaven and earth all the time, they wouldn't find him.

"Huh!"

Ye Tian was shocked, he found that this heaven and earth turned out to be a ruin, the origin here was dissipating, the rules of heaven and earth were crumbling, and the infinite territory was annihilating.

In addition, although there are still some living beings in this piece of heaven and earth, they cannot give birth to strong people, and the Tao here is completely broken.

"It seems that a great war broke out in this world, causing this world to be destroyed, and after endless years, this place will be completely shattered and disappeared, and it will merge into the primordial Black Sea!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In addition, Ye Tian felt rejection.

This piece of heaven and earth is rejecting him and getting him out of here.

Even if it is the heaven and earth that are to be destroyed, but after all, it is a level with the end of the realm and the extreme deep sea, and Ye Tian cannot compete, so he can only say that he will hold on a little longer.

"I could be here for hundreds of millions of eternity!"

Ye Tian estimated.

This is still because he has comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole Dao and several other Extreme Extreme Dao, so that he can resist the power of this heaven and earth, so he can stay for so long.

At this moment, he completely understood why the Lord of the Northern Underworld had come here again and again, obviously they couldn't stay here for a long time, and they would be ostracized after a while, and they couldn't wait for a long time in the Primordial Black Sea, and they would also be ostracized.

So, after a while, they had to return to the end of the realm and wait for the repulsion to pass before they could re-enter it.

In this way, although it is a waste of time, it is also something that cannot be helped.

In the following years, Ye Tian wandered in this world, infiltrated many forces, and silently took away their inheritance.

After all, there are almost no strong people here, and the most powerful ones are only high-level perfect controllers, not a single super-level perfect controller.

Because this piece of heaven and earth does not allow you to comprehend another kind of extreme path, if you can't comprehend the extreme way, you naturally can't become a super perfect controller.

Moreover, there is no way to give birth to such a life as an extreme creature here.

For a powerhouse like Ye Tian, all the resources here can be taken away at will.

"It's no wonder that those Extreme Dao True River Perfect Masters have come here again and again, although the resources here are scarce, and new Extreme Dao resources cannot be born, but some forces even have a lot of Extreme Dao resources, but they can't refine Extreme Dao resources. Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, there may be a Extreme Dao Monument and treasures containing the Extreme Extreme Dao, after all, even if the heavens and the earth are destroyed, these treasures will not disappear!

Find any of them, they're all big catches!

At this moment, Ye Tian was excited.

"If I find more Extreme Dao Monuments or treasures containing Extreme Extreme Dao, I will make a lot of money," Ye Tian thought to himself!!

And now, Ye Tian also knows the name of this piece of heaven and earth.

"Ten Directions Black Domain!"

Once, the Ten Directions Black Domain was also a very prosperous place, with an area like the Ten Black Domains, there were many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and at the peak, they even reached tens of thousands of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

However, a long time ago, a terrifying creature entered the Ten Directions Black Domain from the Primordial Black Sea, and a great war broke out, although many of those creatures were also killed, but the Ten Directions Black Domain was also blown up, and countless cultivators fell, even the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm also fell.

These creatures devoured countless living beings and then left.

The Ten Directions Black Domain was wiped out, and now these creatures were all born from the Ten Directions Black Domain, and they have obtained the inheritance of their predecessors and have grown step by step, but they can only grow to the realm of a high-level perfect controller, and there is no way.

And here, they can't comprehend the Extreme Dao, let alone the Extreme Extreme Dao, so they can't leave the Ten Directions Black Domain, and in the end they will only be wiped out with the Ten Directions Black Domain, and this is their result.

Those high-level perfection controllers also knew this, so they were very crazy one by one, trying all kinds of secret techniques to try to master the extreme path, and even not sucking and devouring countless living beings to strengthen their own bodies, but they all failed.

Ye Tian didn't care about the creatures of the Ten Directions Black Domain, he only cared about his own harvest.

He relied on the Extreme Cause and Effect Extreme Path, and the speed of finding resources was very fast, and he could stay here for a long time, so the few Extreme Realm Perfect Masters of the Extreme Dao True River couldn't match his search speed at all.

However, the resources left behind by the Ten Directions Black Domain were not as many as Ye Tian imagined.

"It seems that there was definitely an Extreme Realm Perfect Controller who escaped into the Primordial Black Sea with a large amount of resources, maybe he was killed in the Primordial Black Sea, and everything fell into the Primordial Black Sea, and the harvest here is probably not as much as I imagined!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Still, it's nice to be able to find some good stuff.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian found more than a dozen Extreme Dao Monuments, and the more broken Extreme Dao Monuments, the value was not great.

And the treasures that contain the extreme path, he has also found more than a dozen, as for the various inheritances, there are indeed a lot, but it is a pity that for a strong person like him, the inheritance has no value.

this day.

Ye Tian used a scale to cast the Extreme Cause and Effect Extreme Dao and found the corpse of a living being.

An area of near-extinction in the Ten Directions Black Domain, which even merged with the Primordial Black Sea, and the corpse of that creature was about to be swallowed by the Primordial Black Sea.

The creature's corpse was still intact, and it was immensely large, the size of a realm.

When Ye Tian used his replication talent to spy on the corpse of this creature, he saw its talent.

"There are actually three extreme Dao ancestors!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

【Extreme Ancestor: Black Armor】

【Extreme Ancestral Endowment: Strength】

【Extreme Ancestor: Darkness】

According to the feedback from the copy talent, this creature is called the Primordial Black Beast.

Judging by the name, it is believed to be a creature from the primordial Black Sea.

"Primordial Black Beast, I've been in the Primordial Black Sea for so long, and I haven't seen it, it seems that the secret of the Primordial Black Sea is too big!" Ye Tian muttered.

He copied all of these three Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, and then took the Primordial Black Beast away.

The strength of this primordial black beast is not weak, it is much stronger than the ordinary Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, and at its peak, it may not be weaker than the Lord of the White Night.

The scales and bones of this creature can be used to craft weapons, and it may be possible to create weapons that are superior to the Extreme.
